price: Dem Menschen wird an jenem Tag kundgetan, was er vorausgeschickt und zurückgestellt hat.
arabic: يُنَبَّؤُاْ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: yunabba-u al-insānu yawma-idhin bimā qaddama wa-akhara
